blockers.workaround: D-02/D-03: builds+metadata+submission is the deliverable; live/approval gated externally, not a phase blocker

blockers.description: Real NIDA + Azampay + upstream SMS production credentials still pending (standing Phase-0 items)
blockers.workaround: all mock-first in backend; app builds against stubs/live APIs as available

human_actions_pending.action: Provision Apple/Google developer accounts + signing keystore before 06-12 store submission

decisions.decision: Pace Phase 6 one wave per session via /gsd-execute-phase 6 --wave N --tdd
decisions.rationale: 12 plans + first Flutter app; repeated session/spend-limit interruptions handled cleanly by /gsd-resume-work which recovers any uncommitted/half-done plan.
This client phase legitimately required small Spring additions before the Flutter screens that consume them; all done + tested.

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 6 --wave 4 --tdd to build STK purchase (consumes 06-02 GET /payments/{id}), flat contacts, and notification feed (3 disjoint Flutter feature areas). Then wave 5 (composer + history, consumes 06-03 contactIds) and wave 6 (store submission, manual checkpoint).
context_notes: Phase 6 (Flutter customer app, final phase) at 7/12 plans (58%); milestone at ~76% overall (5 phases complete + phase 6 half done). Working tree clean, all pushed to origin/main (xxGreyscale/sms-reseller, latest 09a65cd). App at apps/customer-app: Flutter 3.41.5, Riverpod 3 (@riverpod/Notifier), go_router 17 (3-guard wall), Dio QueuedInterceptor (refresh-on-401), flutter_secure_storage (JWT) + hive_ce_flutter (read-cache), l10n EN+SW. Auth journey end-to-end (register→PENDING-poll via /auth/me→VERIFIED→dashboard). Shared widget kit + Verified-only NavigationBar shell in place. MOBL placeholders MOBL-05..09 remain red-by-design until their waves. Run flutter via: cd apps/customer-app && flutter test / flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos. Backend gap services (payment/messaging/contact/identity/notification) all green. Docker + Flutter 3.41.5 available locally. RESEARCH open question: iOS CI macos-latest runner for flutter build ipa (06-12).
